Introduction to Gaines County

Arrows in Gaines County

Arrow #13: Seagraves

More Details for Arrow #13

Coordinates: 32.9411281, -102.5629659

Installed: December 14, 2011

Marker Text:

None

No image available for this arrow.

Arrow #14: Seminole

More Details for Arrow #14

Coordinates: 32.7195781, -102.6527727

Installed: December 14, 2011

Dedicated: October 20, 2012

Marker Text:

In honor of Quanah Parker, last Comanche Chief, who legend says was born at Cedar Lake circa 1852

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
